channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Most bosses admit using some form of snooping software to spy on staff
item.description: Bosses think remote employee monitoring is building trust, morale and productivity - but they’re wrong.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is Six Sigma? Streamlining quality management
item.description: What is Six Sigma? Six Sigma is a quality management methodology used to help businesses improve current processes, products, or services by discovering and eliminating defects.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nvidia's RTX 5080 has dethroned AMD's RX 7900 XTX at the same price – but good luck finding one
item.description: Nvidia's RTX 5080 defeats AMD's Radeon RX 7900 XTX in several games at the same price, but with scalpers involved, it could be a struggle to attain the new GPU.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The quantum computing reality check
item.description: In late 2024, a major pharmaceutical company invested $50 million in quantum computing initiatives through a leading cloud provider, hoping to revolutionize their drug discovery process.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Plunge into Python: New tools and tips for Python developers
item.description: Create luscious-looking full-stack websites in nothing but Python, get a hands-on lesson in integrating Rust and Python, and learn everything you need to know about the care and feeding of Python virtual environments.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Workforce collaboration strategies to keep your teams happy
item.description: No matter where employees work day-to-day, the office is the heart of every business. It’s where companies create and reinforce the culture and experience that are central to their relationship with employees.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Ericsson provides 5G solutions to hybrid workforce
item.description: Founded as a telephony business in Stockholm in 1876, Ericsson is a provider of wireless and 5G services to telecoms operators worldwide and is currently investing heavily in cloud-based enterprise solutions. At the same time, the business’s basic principles remain unchanged.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Stay ahead of security threats to support hybrid work
item.description: HP Print Security Software Solutions provide simplified secure print management to the distributed workforce, reducing security risks, improving IT efficiencies, and enhancing employee experiences.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: If you were bored watching videos at a plodding 2x speed, you’re in luck: They can go faster
item.description: MrBeast’s fast-cutting, nonstop dramatics are already quick enough. Now, some users can watch his videos (and others) at 4x speed. YouTube is continuing its push for pace. In a new experiment, Premium users will be able to quadruple the speed of its videos.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Grim memories resurface after DNA advances lead to arrest of suspect in Hawaii teen's 1977 murder
item.description: The unsolved death of a teenager in 1977 haunted students and staff at Honolulu's McKinley High School for nearly half a century.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Sinco Kelleher, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: After a week of DeepSeek freakout, doubts and mysteries remain
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft posts 10% growth for Q4 as it plans to spend $80 billion on AI
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Tesla’s Q4 results fell short of Wall Street’s forecasts. Here’s why
item.description: Tesla’s fourth-quarter adjusted profits rose slightly amid a big push to sell its electric vehicles with offers of zero financing and other incentives, but the results still fell short of Wall Street forecasts.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: US cybersecurity agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Watch out Nvidia, a Linux leak revealing three new Intel Arc Battlemage GPUs may challenge the RTX 5000 series
item.description: Nvidia's RTX 5000 series could see some competition as a Linux leak may have revealed three new Intel Arc Battlemage GPUs.
item.dc:creator: allisa.james@futurenet.com (Allisa James), TechRadar

item.title: Amazon sues state agency to block release of company records to Bezos-owned Washington Post
item.description: Amazon is suing an agency in Washington state to prevent the release of some company materials to The Washington Post.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to organize, protect and streamline your inbox with an email alias
item.description: Creating an email alias can help clean up your inbox by organizing emails based on purpose, like creating different aliases for shopping, newsletters and work.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Browser Use: An open-source AI agent to automate web-based tasks
item.description: Author’s note: The generative AI revolution has sparked an explosion of open-source tools that fundamentally transform how developers build and deploy AI-powered applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Sourcegraph unveils AI coding agents
item.description: Looking to challenge well-established GitHub Copilot in AI-powered coding assistance, Sourcegraph has announced coding agents for code review, code migration, testing, documentation, and notification, along with an API for building custom agents. Sourcegraph made the announcement on January 29.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Amazon secretly tracked Californian consumers via cellphones, lawsuit alleges
item.description: Amazon.com was sued on Wednesday by consumers who accused the retailing giant of secretly tracking their movements through their cellphones, and selling data it collects.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: This group is playing ‘Dungeons & Dragons’ to help L.A. fire victims, and you can join in
item.description: The devastating California wildfires have led to a number of benefit events, from concerts to comedy shows, with the intention to fundraise for wildfire recovery efforts. The team at Critical Role, meanwhile, is going to do what they do best: play Dungeons & Dragons.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Meta Platforms Sees Revenue Growth Amid AI Ambitions
item.description: Meta Platforms Inc. reports higher profit and revenue for its fourth quarter, driven by increased ad revenue on social media properties. The company forecasts increasing expenses on artificial intelligence efforts.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Most in new poll disapprove of Musk's role in Trump administration
item.description: Most registered voters disapprove of tech billionaire Elon Musk’s role in the Trump administration, according to a poll released Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: UnitedHealth Confirms Ransomware Attack Affects 190 Million Americans
item.description: Ransomware attack on UnitedHealth's Change Healthcare unit exposes sensitive data of nearly half the US population, highlighting the need for robust cybersecurity measures and vigilance against scams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UK regulator may investigate AWS and Microsoft cloud businesses
item.description: AWS and Microsoft could potentially face an investigation of their cloud businesses in Britain should the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) follow the recommendation of an independent inquiry group that reports into the UK’s antitrust regulator.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Vatican document offers AI guidelines from warfare to health care
item.description: VATICAN CITY (AP) — A Vatican document released Tuesday offers wide-ranging ethical guidelines for the application of artificial intelligence in sectors from warfare to health care, with an underlying call that the burgeoning technology must be used as a tool to complement, and not replace, human in
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: EY’s own experience with AI provides important lessons
item.description: Anja Allen, a principal at EY, said the internal rollout of Microsoft Copilot offered insights into what goes into successful AI implementations. The post EY’s own experience with AI provides important lessons first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Federal employee lawsuit alleges security, privacy risks in new OPM communications system
item.description: The plaintiffs claim OPM violated the E-Government Act by not releasing details of how the email system will manage federal employees’ personal information. The post Federal employee lawsuit alleges security, privacy risks in new OPM communications system first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
